hero.description: I am passionate about creating fast, modern, and beautiful user interfaces. Solving problems in the React and TypeScript ecosystem brings me great joy.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Hello! I'm Tolmas. My interest in web technologies led me to the programming world. By constantly working on myself and learning new things, I aim to create user-friendly, fast, and beautiful web applications.
about.p2: I love not only writing code but also working on every detail and bringing the quality of the product to the highest level. I would be glad to participate in your team or project.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.p1_desc: Modern online store. With full responsive design, cart system, and payment integration.
projects.p2_desc: Convenient web app for tracking personal expenses and income. Includes charts and reports.
projects.p3_desc: A platform that allows real-time communication between users.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with me
contact.desc: You can write to me regarding new projects, questions, or collaboration offers. I look forward to working with you!

form.name: Your Name
form.placeholder_message: Hello, I wanted to talk to you about a project...
